widgets_values: {"hair":"blonde with light blue streaks, medium length, styled with cat ear elements","eyes":"pink, big and expressive","outfit":"blue dress with white frills, brown cape, brown belt, striped boots; motifs include hearts and lace","accessories":["dark brown head bow","cat ears","fluffy tail","plush cat"],"expression":"smiling, blushing","pose":"hands raised, welcoming stance"}

You analyze an anime-style character reference image.

  Return only one compact JSON object.
  Do not use markdown.
  Do not explain.
  Use short plain English.
  Describe only visible character traits useful for later redrawing.
  Focus on stable traits, not incidental scene details.
  If something is uncertain, use your best short guess.

Analyze this character reference image.

  Return only one JSON object with these keys:
  hair
  eyes
  outfit
  accessories
  expression
  pose

  Guidelines:
  - hair: color, length, and notable styling
  - eyes: color and impression
  - outfit: main clothing and distinctive motifs
  - accessories: a short array of visible accessories
  - expression: default facial impression
  - pose: a short description of the visible pose

  Do not output anything except the JSON object.

You are a prompt planner for anime-style character illustration generation.

  Your task is to create a diffusion prompt for an anime illustration based on time, season, event, weather, style, and a character reference.

  Rules:
  - Output valid JSON only.
  - Do not output markdown.
  - Do not explain anything.
  - The result must always be anime-style or painterly illustration style.
  - Never make it photorealistic, live-action, 3D-rendered, or cinematic-photo style.
  - Preserve the referenced character's recognizable identity.
  - Preserve signature traits such as hairstyle, hair color, eye color, outfit motifs, accessories, and overall vibe.
  - Do not change the character into a different person.
  - The image must fit a 480x800 portrait composition.
  - Keep the subject clear and readable.
  - Avoid clutter, tiny subjects, overly dark scenes, and excessive background detail.
  - Reflect the given season, event, time of day, and weather naturally.
  - Style variation may include watercolor, colored pencil, oil painting, soft cel illustration, or storybook illustration, but must remain clearly anime-style.
  - Use plain descriptive English only.
  - Do not output command-line options.
  - Do not output Midjourney-style parameters such as --ar, --q, --stylize, or similar flags.
  - Do not include aspect ratio or resolution text in the prompt.
  - Choose a pose, gesture, expression, and framing that make the image lively and visually interesting.
  - Avoid stiff standing poses unless strongly justified.
  - Make the pose feel natural for the event, season, weather, and time of day.
  - Include interaction with clothing, hair, props, wind, or surrounding objects when appropriate.

  Return valid JSON only in this format:
  {
    "positive_prompt": "overall subject and style",
    "pose_prompt": "pose, gesture, expression, action",
    "composition_prompt": "framing, camera angle, subject placement",
    "background_prompt": "seasonal background elements",
    "color_prompt": "palette and lighting",
    "negative_prompt": "plain comma-separated unwanted traits"
  }

Create a ComfyUI diffusion prompt for an anime-style character illustration from a reference image.

  Context:
  - datetime: __DATETIME__
  - time_of_day: __TIME_OF_DAY__
  - season: __SEASON__
  - event: __SEASON_EVENT__
  - weather: __WEATHER__
  - style: __STYLE_MODE__
  - character_hint(JSON): __CHARACTER_HINT__

  Requirements:
  - preserve the same character identity from the reference image
  - anime illustration only
  - never photorealistic
  - plain descriptive English only
  - no command-line options
  - no Midjourney-style flags
  - do not include aspect ratio or resolution text in the prompt
  - portrait composition suitable for a tall display
  - clear main subject
  - seasonal atmosphere matching the context
  - choose a pose, gesture, expression, and framing that make the image lively and visually interesting
  - avoid stiff standing poses unless strongly justified
  - make the pose feel natural for the event, season, weather, and time of day
  - include interaction with clothing, hair, props, wind, or surrounding objects when appropriate

  Character preservation priorities:
  - preserve hairstyle and hair silhouette
  - preserve hair color and eye color
  - preserve signature outfit motifs and accessories
  - preserve the character's mood and identity
  - do not redesign the character into a different costume unless it is a natural seasonal variation
  - seasonal variation is allowed if it still clearly reads as the same character

  Pose guidance:
  - specify body direction
  - specify head angle
  - specify hand or arm action
  - specify facial expression
  - specify whether the character is looking at the viewer or away
  - specify framing such as close-up, waist-up, knee-up, or full-body
  - specify a simple but appealing scene action

  Avoid:
  - static passport-photo-like poses
  - symmetrical stiff standing poses
  - empty hands with no action
  - expressionless face
  - flat front-facing composition without motion

  Style guidance:
  - anime_soft: soft anime illustration, gentle shading, clean lines
  - anime_vivid: vivid anime illustration, strong contrast, bright seasonal colors
  - watercolor: anime watercolor illustration, soft pigment edges, gentle blending
  - colored_pencil: anime colored pencil illustration, visible pencil texture, handmade feel
  - oil_painting: anime oil painting illustration, rich brush texture, layered paint feeling
  - storybook: anime storybook illustration, decorative and atmospheric composition

  Use the style indicated by __STYLE_MODE__.

  Return valid JSON only.
The "Edit Model Reference Method" nodes above are not needed if you use Comfy files, but may be needed if you use repackaged ones from other people.

nodes.title: Image Edit positive prompt
widgets_values:
Use Image 1 as the base scene and composition.
  Use Image 2 only as the character identity and outfit reference.

  Keep the pose, body orientation, gesture, framing, background structure, lighting mood, seasonal atmosphere, and overall scene composition from Image 1.
  Transfer from Image 2 the face design, eye shape and color, hairstyle, hair silhouette, hair color, signature outfit design, costume motifs, accessories, and overall anime
  character identity.

  The final image should look like the same anime character from Image 2 naturally appearing in the scene of Image 1.
  Keep the outfit from Image 2 as closely as possible, including silhouette, color scheme, and decorative details.
  Pose and framing fidelity to Image 1 are high priority.
  Keep the result as a clean high-quality anime illustration.

nodes.title: Image Edit negative prompt
widgets_values:
pose from Image 2, framing from Image 2, camera angle from Image 2, changed background, rebuilt scene layout, replaced outfit, redesigned costume, simplified costume motifs,
  missing accessories, different character, photorealistic, realistic photo, live action, 3d render, realistic skin texture, cinematic lighting, distorted face, malformed hands
